← Back to Tritonet

Tritonet Help

What is Tritonet?

Tritonet is a harmonic and modal performance system that maps chord movement, anchor logic, and modal color into an interactive visual-musical interface. It allows real-time exploration of harmony, voice-leading, and expressive control.

How to Use the App

  • Use the circular table and note/anchor controls to shape harmony.
  • Use Table / Mode / Chooser rows to change tonal center and modal behavior.
  • Manual ON exposes the Execute button for hold-to-play output.
  • When Manual is OFF, the app follows perform/filter behavior.

Keyboard Controls

  • z x c v b n m: anchor notes
  • 1 2 3 4 5 6 7: table/tonal center shortcuts
  • q w e r t y u: mode selection
  • a s d f g h j: chooser controls
  • , .: nightline sharp/flat steps
  • Space: Execute (only when Manual is ON)

Credits

Concept and program by Tolga Zafer Özdemir.
